title: NANA Shareholders Elect 2023 Board of Directors
summary: At today’s annual meeting held in Selawik, NANA shareholders voted to elect seven directors to the NANA board for three-year terms: Nellie Sheldon (Ambler), Gary Hadley (Buckland), Bonita Barr (Deering), Lee “Big Boy” Staheli (Kiana), Myra Wesley (Kivalina), Pearl Gomez (Kobuk) and Lance Kramer (Kot...

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: March 23, 2023
summary: March 23 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice has been going through some ups and downs and has now shown a net increase , since last week, by a very small rate at 0.31% , from the level on 03/16/2023 of 14.357 M km 2 to 14.402 M km 2 for this week; and so while I think we are in the sea ice declin...
